form.formComment: Capable of better than we have seen lately. Last start 5th (Fr3) over 1609m at Newcastle beaten 5 m by One For The Rodi (1:53.00) in NR 63 to 67 on April 10 at $23. At the previous start 8th (Sr3) over 1609m at this track was 7th-16.11 at the bell, beaten 13 m by Jayjaybenny (1:55.80) in NR up to 70 on March 26 at $26. Should get her chance from the ace draw.

Before that 6th (Fr2) over 1609m at this track, at the bell was 7th-16.23 beaten 10 m by Amillion Promises (1:58.00) in NR up to 58 on March 26 at $8. Draws well so may improve.

form.formComment: Good run when beaten by 3.5 m finishing second behind Arnies Army at Narrabri over 2160m in a NR up to 70 on April 5 at $8.50. Then a handy effort when well beaten into third behind Arnies Army at Narrabri over 2560m in a NR up to 90 on April 12 at $5. Working towards a win.

form.formComment: Recent form below what he is capable of. Last start 9th (Fr6) over 1609m at Newcastle, well beaten by One For The Rodi (1:53.00) in NR 63 to 67 on April 10 at $18. The run prior was well back in the run when 9th (Fr6) over 2030m at Newcastle, at the bell was 6th-10.5 beaten 18 m by Kanena Provlima (2:25.40) in NR up to 80 on April 2 at $31. With his A-game he is capable of taking this out.

form.formComment: Won three starts back at this track over 1609m NR up to 58 on March 26. Last start 7th (Sr2) over 2030m at Newcastle beaten 22 m by Ohwhatiwouldgive (2:24.20) in NR up to 57 on April 10 at $26. Maybe a place.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Hampered for a short distance in the early stages of the score up.
Near the 400m, shifted in whilst hanging in, when not quite clear.

form.formComment: Having his second run back from a spell. Game effort despite getting well back, when 3rd (Fr6) over 1609m at Newcastle beaten 2.75 m by Metallica Man (1:52.90) in NR up to 90 on April 10 at $8.50. Fitter and down in grade so can take this out.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Worked forward to the lead approaching the 1100m.

form.formComment: Last start broke in score up and was out of position at the start 2nd (Sr1) over 2160m at Narrabri, at the bell was 3rd-3.8 beaten a neck by Otis Rising (2:41.90) in NR 45 to 55 on April 12 at $3.10. Two runs back won by 4.5 m (Sr2) at Narrabri (2:39.30) beating Grosestar in NR 45 to 55 on April 5 at $7.50. Needs to do more. Not easy from this draw.
